name: strategy_fusion_coverage_repaired_v1
dataset_protocol: CrystaLLM Table 3 official MP-20 and MPTS-52 test splits
selection_policy: Frozen before opentry_8 full-test evaluation. Preserve CrystaLLM-a GT-SG candidate order as the primary anchor; append supplemental candidates only when primary slots are absent; never use StructureMatcher/test labels/oracle feedback for ordering.
fallback_policy: If primary and supplemental sources together still provide fewer than 20 candidates for an official sample, write explicit invalid placeholder CIF text for the remaining slots. These slots are candidates-present but parse-fail, so they count as failures without dropping the sample.
dedupe: Exact generated_text dedupe within each sample before fallback placeholders.
candidate_budget_label: strict K20 final candidates; no large-pool reranking
not_allowed: StructureMatcher feedback for order or thresholds
using historical stablekey top20 as final backbone
